MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF OMAR LIMA'S Motion For Order Granting Leave To Amend Complaint To Substitute Party's True Name For Fictitious Name, To Correct Mistake, And Add Causes Of Action, And Continuance Of Trial Date

Appearances:
Christina Schreiber of Wartelle Weaver & Schreiber, 693-0504, appearing for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: Granted with the exception of the portion to continue trial. MINI MINUTES: Appearances for Wednesday, SEP-13-2006: Christina Schreiber, Esq. appears for Plaintiff Omar Lima; Mr. Cory L. Fuller, Esq. appears for Cross-Defendant T.P.T. Gardner (not present this date); Defendant Mr. Tae I. Chin appears this day in Propria Persona; Veronica H. Garcia, Esq
additionally appears from Lynch, Gilardi & Grummer for Leewens Corp.; Court and counsel convene on the record; Defendant Chin has not yet obtained counsel; the Court indicates that if they wish to convene on a later date with Mr. Chin and his counsel, they are to contact the clerk and arrange a date; trial date in January 2007 remains.

Hon. Ellen Chaitin; Reported Brenda Fields, CSR #7235; Clerk Marjorie Manzella (D-220).

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Christina Schreiber. for Plaintiff/Moving party
Tae Chin, Defendant appeared in Propria Persona
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond fully was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,180, to be paid by June 30, 2006. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Jun-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Christina Schreiber. for Plaintiff/Moving party
Tae Chin, Defendant appeared in Propria Persona
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond fully was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond further by June 30, 2006. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
